home.name: Christoper John Aranda
home.title: Full Stack Developer — Building End-to-End
home.description:
I build digital solutions that don't just work — they make a difference.
I believe great code is about real impact, not just technical perfection.

about.heading: About Me
about.description: My journey as a Full Stack Developer was born from a relentless curiosity and a genuine love for solving problems through code. I believe a great application isn't just about technical performance — it's about the real impact it creates for its users. From building e-commerce platforms and mobile apps to national-scale systems, I approach every project with one principle: great technology should be both powerful and deeply human. I'm committed to writing clean, maintainable code and continuously sharpening my craft to stay ahead in an ever-evolving industry.

umn.desc2: Focused on web and mobile application development with modern technologies

kpk.title: Junior Programmer
kpk.description: Building and maintaining a national-scale web application using React and Laravel to support law enforcement operations across Indonesia.
kpk.achievement1: Built a nationwide corruption trial recording application now deployed across all regions of Indonesia
kpk.achievement2: Developed full-stack application using React, Vite, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS for the frontend layer
kpk.achievement3: Designed a robust backend system with Laravel and PostgreSQL for handling critical legal data
kpk.achievement4: Worked directly with KPK's legal team to ensure the application meets judicial recording standards and compliance regulations

maro.title: Full Stack Developer
maro.description: Developed and maintained full-stack web applications using React, Next.js, Expo, and Node.js with a strong focus on performance and seamless user experience.
maro.achievement1: Improved web application performance by 40% by implementing React and Next.js best practices
maro.achievement2: Built RESTful APIs using Express and MySQL reliably serving over 1,000 daily requests
maro.achievement3: Delivered responsive UI/UX with Tailwind CSS and TypeScript, contributing to a 35% increase in user engagement

sub.title: Website Developer
sub.description: Developed and maintained web applications with a focus on responsive front-end development and UI optimization using modern JavaScript frameworks.
sub.achievement1: Applied responsive design patterns and optimized code structure, cutting load time by 40%
sub.achievement2: Developed and integrated new features with React.js, driving a 15% increase in user engagement
sub.achievement3: Actively contributed to team knowledge sharing and documentation, meaningfully improving development workflow efficiency

1.title: Water Billing Management System
1.description: A full-stack platform for calculating and managing customer water usage bills, complete with secure payment integration and automated reporting.

2.title: Restaurant Landing Page
2.description: A modern, visually-rich landing page for a restaurant featuring an interactive menu, online ordering system, and smooth animations.

3.title: Company Profile Website
3.description: A professional website designed to introduce a company, showcase its key services, and build credibility with potential clients.

4.title: Franchise POS System
4.description: A comprehensive Point of Sale mobile app built for franchise cashiers — featuring inventory management, real-time sales tracking, and detailed business reporting.

5.title: Corruption Trial Recording App
5.description: A national-scale web system for recording and managing corruption trial proceedings across Indonesia, built directly for the Corruption Eradication Commission (KPK).

6.title: TELUNAS Application
6.description: A digital investigation platform for KPK that enables in-depth tracing of individuals, companies, and foundations through integration with multiple external APIs.

contact.pageSubtitle: Have a project idea or want to collaborate? I'd love to hear about it.
contact.connectMessage:
I'm open to new opportunities, exciting projects, or even just a good conversation.
Don't hesitate to reach out — I usually respond quickly!
